summary: Frontend testing complete for Onboarding Step 2 redesign. All 10 features tested and working correctly. No console errors detected. Mobile responsiveness verified.
passed_tests: Step 2 - Store selection UI loads with Popular Stores visible immediately - PASSED
Step 2 - Clicking a store card toggles selection (visual checkmark appears) - PASSED
Step 2 - Selected stores appear as pills at the top with remove button - PASSED
Step 2 - Store count updates in real-time (X selected badge) - PASSED
Step 2 - Continue button text updates dynamically (Continue with X stores) - PASSED
Step 2 - Continue button is disabled when 0 stores selected - PASSED
Step 2 - Search input filters stores in real-time with dropdown - PASSED
Step 2 - Clicking search result adds store and clears search - PASSED
Step 2 - Can proceed to Step 3 after selecting stores - PASSED
No console errors on any page - PASSED
Mobile responsiveness - Step 2 UI works on mobile viewport - PASSED
Step 2 - More Stores section displays additional stores - PASSED
Step 2 - Pill remove button deselects store correctly - PASSED
Step 2 - Store card deselection on second click works - PASSED
Step 2 - Clear search button (X) works correctly - PASSED
Step 2 - Location button 'Show stores near me' present - PASSED
Step 2 - Back button navigates to Step 1 - PASSED
Step 2 - Search shows 'No stores found' for invalid queries - PASSED
critical_code_review_comments: Step 2 redesign is well-implemented with excellent UX patterns
Selected stores pills with remove buttons provide clear visual feedback
Fixed bottom action bar is good for mobile UX
Search dropdown with real-time filtering works smoothly
test_credentials: name='Test User', email='test@example.com' (no auth required for onboarding)
seed_data_creation: None - used existing store data from API/defaults
context_for_next_testing_agent: Onboarding Step 2 (store selection) redesign tested and verified. All interactive features work: (1) Store card selection with checkmarks, (2) Selected stores pills with remove buttons, (3) Real-time badge counter, (4) Dynamic continue button text, (5) Search with dropdown, (6) More Stores section, (7) Fixed bottom action bar. Mobile responsive verified. No console errors. Ready for production.
